info.title: EventXperience Backend API
info.description: Generated API reference for the EventXperience backend. Responses use the shared ApiResponse envelope unless noted otherwise.

400.description: Bad request, validation failure, or CSRF failure.

401.description: Authentication is required or the access token is invalid/expired.

403.description: The authenticated user does not have permission to perform this action.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional client-generated idempotency key used to safely retry checkout session creation.

parameters.name: X-CSRF-TOKEN
parameters.description: CSRF token obtained from `/api/auth/csrf`. Browser clients must send the `XSRF-TOKEN` cookie and mirror its value in this header.

post.description: API-token session refresh. Supply refresh and session-binding tokens through headers or the request body.

parameters.name: X-Refresh-Token
parameters.description: Optional refresh token header for API-token clients. If omitted, the request body value is used.

parameters.name: X-Session-Binding
parameters.description: Optional session-binding header for API-token clients. If omitted, the request body value is used.

400.description: Bad request, validation failure, or CSRF failure.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Authentication, session, CSRF, verification, and password recovery flows.

tags.name: clubs
tags.description: Club management, discovery, membership, reviews, staff, and club content.

tags.name: events
tags.description: Event CRUD, search, drafts, invitations, registrations, analytics, and assets.

tags.name: payments
tags.description: Stripe checkout, payment retrieval, refunds, and webhook processing.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User-centric resources such as followed clubs, reviews, and registrations.

tags.name: admin
tags.description: Administrative endpoints for moderation, user management, and reindex operations.
